deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'set -x; echo STEP1; python -c "import app.config; print(\"config ok\")" 2>&1 || true; echo STEP2; python -c "from app.config import get_settings; s=get_settings(); print(\"settings ok env=\" + s.app_env)" 2>&1 || true; echo STEP3; alembic -c alembic/alembic.ini current 2>&1 || true; echo STEP4; alembic -c alembic/alembic.ini upgrade head 2>&1 || true; echo STEP5; python -c "import app.main; print(\"main ok\")" 2>&1 || true; echo STEP6; exec uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT --log-level debug'
